title: チーム総合力アップ・金色の差し入れ

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Excellent work, Trainer! What you've achieved
with your team is truly incredible!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Seeing the runners grow this much... It's so
touching!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to see all the things they'll
accomplish, so I brought a little something to
help. Please, take this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The thoughtful gift from Tazuna gets the team
extra fired up to win the Unity Cup!
